MUST: User model MUST extend AbstractUser with custom user_type field (RF-002)
Email field MUST be unique and validated with EmailValidator (RF-002)
User model MUST use email as USERNAME_FIELD (RF-002)
user_type field MUST have exactly two choices: 'tutor' and 'client' (RF-002)
All models MUST include verbose_name and verbose_name_plural in Meta (RNF-004)
SHOULD: User model SHOULD maintain Django AbstractUser compatibility (RF-002)
MUST_NOT: User email MUST NOT accept duplicate values (RF-002)
user_type MUST NOT accept values outside defined choices (RF-002)
user_type MUST NOT be modifiable after registration (RF-002)
Required fields MUST NOT have null=True or blank=True (RNF-004)

MUST: ClientProfile MUST have OneToOne relationship with User (RF-002)
ClientProfile is_minor field MUST default to False (RF-003)
ClientProfile MUST have parent_email field for minors (RF-003, RNF-008)
ClientProfile parent_email MUST be validated with EmailValidator when is_minor=True (RF-003)
SHOULD: ClientProfile bio, phone_number, avatar_url, parent_name SHOULD allow null and blank (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: ClientProfile parent_email MUST NOT be empty when is_minor=True (RF-003, RNF-008)
Model relationships MUST NOT violate referential integrity (RNF-004)

MUST: TutorProfile MUST have OneToOne relationship with User (RF-004)
TutorProfile hourly_rate MUST support decimal values max_digits=6, decimal_places=2 (RF-004)
TutorProfile data MUST be structured as public information within the platform (RF-004)
SHOULD: TutorProfile SHOULD maintain legacy subjects field for backward compatibility (RNF-004)
TutorProfile hourly_rate, phone_number, bio, experience SHOULD allow null and blank (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: TutorProfile public fields MUST NOT include sensitive personal data (RNF-002)
Model relationships MUST NOT violate referential integrity (RNF-004)

MUST: Subject name MUST be unique with verbose_name 'Nombre de la Materia' (RF-004)
Subject slug MUST be auto-generated from name if not provided (RF-004)
MUST_NOT: Subject name MUST NOT accept duplicate values (RNF-004)

MUST: TutorProfileManager MUST implement get_tutors_by_location(city, country) returning prioritized queryset (RF-001, RNF-001)
All TutorProfileManager querysets MUST use select_related('user') (RNF-001)
Priority order MUST be: same city → same country → others (RF-001)
MUST_NOT: Location filtering logic MUST NOT be implemented in views (RNF-004)

out_of_scope: PostGIS spatial queries — DEFERRED to production (RF-001 out_of_scope)
